summary: Actions not SHA-pinned (use v4 tags, not commit hashes—violates requirement). Script missing `-euo` in `set` (only `-o pipefail`). Workflow lacks programmatic output assertions—runs tests but doesn't validate exact expected values. Test cases 1–6 (workflow lines 30–55) repeat boilerplate; should loop. Depends on test file `tests/test_matrix_generator.bats` not provided.
